description_long: This object consists of two medium-sized pumpkins with a classic round, ribbed shape and a slightly flattened base. The pumpkins are a vibrant orange color with subtle brownish streaks and shading, giving them a natural, organic appearance. Each pumpkin features a short, thick green stem that is slightly bent and textured, adding to the realism. The surface of the pumpkins is matte with visible grooves and shallow indentations, mimicking the irregularities found in real pumpkins. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories present. The pumpkins appear fresh and intact, suitable for display in an urban park, garden, or outdoor market setting.
description: Two orange, ribbed pumpkins with green stems and natural surface grooves, uncarved and realistic in appearance.
description_view_0: Two pumpkins side by side, both showing their ribbed surfaces and green stems, with one stem angled left and the other upright.
description_view_1: Top-down view of a single pumpkin, highlighting the central green stem and the radial grooves around it.
description_view_2: Front view of both pumpkins, clearly displaying their rounded forms, ribbing, and the contrasting green stems.
description_view_3: View from above and behind, focusing on the stems and the upper surfaces of both pumpkins.
